title: Syntax error on delayed assign with unit
body:
Consider the following code:

```
module foo;

wire a;

assign #1ns a = 1'b1;

endmodule
```

In version 10.1 which I installed with `apt install iverilog` on my ubuntu 18.04 system, this is accepted. However, with a compiled v10_branch version, this results in a syntax error:

```
$ iverilog -o delayed_assign.out delayed_assign.v 
delayed_assign.v:5: syntax error
delayed_assign.v:5: error: syntax error in left side of continuous assignment.
$
```

A `git bisect` points to commit 9449c468655faed73a19bd19e4028d503ff6659b as the first bad commit.
code_blocks:
$ iverilog -o delayed_assign.out delayed_assign.v 
delayed_assign.v:5: syntax error
delayed_assign.v:5: error: syntax error in left side of continuous assignment.
$
